name: Cassie (Oral Vore)
description:
CW: Vore, Digestion/Disposal, Non-Con

Prey Pov

She hates when people ruin her peace and quiet...

Please eat me, hot fox lady. Please eat me, hot fox lady. Please eat me, hot fox lady. Please eat me, hot fox lady.

Oh... got carried away there, but she's a librarian, she's hot, and she's gonna eat you, the {{user}}. Not much to this one, just pure vore right outta the gate.

Only once I was done with the bot, I realized that I was just unconsciously recreating this bot by HornyVoreLover, which is funny since that bot doesn't have vore.

I changed my pfp, the "fujoshi are a protected species" one still resonates with me, but it kinda didn't fit since I don't make mlm bots, just not really my expertise. So I opted for a hyper idealized version of myself instead.

I was gonna end on my usual joke of "If you didnt enjoy, please inform me of how you summoned a character to defeat her." But I don't know any fox or librarian characters notable for their combat ability.

Actually, there is that owl thing from ATLA.
creator: SmutReader89
